author: mark
text:
docs: reflect CLI overhaul in README and SKILL.md

Refresh bl list/ready/show/dep tree reference sections with new
output examples. Add a `CLI look and feel` section documenting
glyphs, badges, epic progress bar, and the --plain/NO_COLOR/
CLICOLOR=0/isatty detection order. Note --json is byte-identical
to before. SKILL.md gains a scraper note pointing agents at --json
(or --plain when absolutely necessary).
